core_vision.summary: Self-evolving math-driven art engine with three interlocking loops
core_vision.loop_1_internal: Local autonomous evolution: math models + knowledge constraints guide generation throughout the entire pipeline (not just final scoring). Must run without AI (AUTONOMOUS mode) and never block on missing AI connection.
core_vision.loop_2_distillation: User uploads PDFs/books/Sprites to Manus chat -> Manus manually distills into knowledge/*.md and math constraints -> pushes to GitHub -> user pulls and runs evolution. Preferred high-quality method.
core_vision.loop_3_math_mining: Manus proactively searches academic papers, GitHub projects, Reddit for relevant math models -> converts to code -> registers in math_registry.py.
quality_principles: No invalid iterations: detect consecutive identical outputs, diagnose root cause, report and halt safely
Knowledge permeates everything: math and art rules guide every stage of generation
Simplicity at core: external tools (GPU, Unity, SD) are optional add-ons
Pseudo-3D ready: preserve extension paths for future pseudo-3D rendering
Cross-session continuity: every new conversation picks up via SESSION_HANDOFF.md
Deduplication without loss: remove duplicates but never discard valuable knowledge
core_vision.collaboration_model: Manus executes code/knowledge tasks -> pushes to GitHub -> User pulls, runs, reports results -> Manus optimizes. User handles local-only tasks (GPU setup, software install).

pending_tasks.notes: 3/4 checkpoints done. Remaining gap: mid_generation checkpoint is implemented in ArtMathQualityController but not yet called in InnerLoopRunner.
Both LevelSpecBridge and ExportBridge are fully implemented, but they are currently disconnected. Need to bridge them.

pending_tasks.description: The Distillation Engine (Waiting for User Input)
pending_tasks.notes: Infrastructure for PDF distillation, math paper mining, sprite learning, and deduplication is fully built. Waiting for user to upload new PDFs, reference books, or sprite images to trigger the next distillation cycle.
Code skeletons for differentiable rendering, Unity Shader knowledge, and Pseudo-3D are already implemented. Deep integration requires user to provide NVIDIA GPU (CUDA 11+) and/or Unity Editor access.

capability_gaps.name: DIFFERENTIABLE_RENDERING
capability_gaps.description: Differentiable rendering requires NVIDIA GPU for real-time parameter gradients

capability_gaps.name: UNITY_SHADER_PREVIEW
capability_gaps.description: Unity Shader preview requires Unity Editor for live rendering feedback

capability_gaps.name: AI_IMAGE_MODEL
capability_gaps.description: High-quality sprite generation requires a diffusion model (e.g., SDXL-Turbo)
capability_gaps.requires: GPU + Stable Diffusion API or local model
